_note: Bounding boxes of MVP glyphs on data/sources/loth-1866/chart.svg (rendered at 1633x1869). Each bbox has y0/y1/x0/x1 in pixels. Because Kurrent glyphs slant and overlap into neighbouring cells, a plain rectangle often catches a sliver of the next letter — the optional `exclude` list is a list of sub-rectangles that get whited out within the main crop. Edit any entry and re-run `uv run python -m mvp.tools.annotate_chart` to verify; `uv run python -m mvp.render_canonicals` picks the same JSON up for the side-by-side review.
